title: Reports and Records
doc_html:
§12. Reports and Records

            Section 12. Reports and records of the collection, expenditure, investment, and use of state money and those relating to state obligations shall be matters of public record, except returns of taxpayers and matters pertaining to those returns.
doc_text:
§12.  Reports and Records
Section 12.  Reports and records of the collection, expenditure, investment, and use
of state money and those relating to state obligations shall be matters of public record, except
returns of taxpayers and matters pertaining to those returns.
